ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the patient */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the patient (M/F) */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the patient */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the patient */,
  "family_history" TEXT /* Family history of the patient */,
  "current_treatment" TEXT /* Current treatment of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "imaging_data" (
  "imaging_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each imaging dataset */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the imaging data belongs to */,
  "modality" TEXT /* Imaging modality (e.g., MRI, CT scan) */,
  "image_date" TEXT /* Date the imaging data was acquired */,
  "image_data" TEXT /* Imaging data itself (e.g., DICOM, NIfTI) */,
  "scanner_model" TEXT /* Model of the scanner used to acquire the data */,
  "scan_parameters" TEXT /* Scan parameters (e.g., resolution, slice thickness) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("imaging_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_imaging_data_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brain_structure_volumes" (
  "volume_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brain structure volume */,
  "imaging_id" INTEGER /* ID of the imaging data the volume was calculated from */,
  "brain_structure" TEXT /* Type of brain structure (e.g., gray matter, white matter) */,
  "volume" REAL /* Volume of the brain structure */,
  "volume_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the volume (e.g., cubic centimeters, milliliters) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("volume_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_brain_structure_volumes_imaging_id FOREIGN KEY ("imaging_id") REFERENCES imaging_data ("imaging_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "csf_volumes" (
  "volume_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each CSF volume */,
  "imaging_id" INTEGER /* ID of the imaging data the volume was calculated from */,
  "csf_volume" REAL /* Volume of CSF */,
  "volume_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the volume (e.g., cubic centimeters, milliliters) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("volume_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_csf_volumes_imaging_id FOREIGN KEY ("imaging_id") REFERENCES imaging_data ("imaging_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alzheimers_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Alzheimer's status entry */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the status belongs to */,
  "alzheimers_status" INTEGER /* Whether the patient has Alzheimer's disease (True/False) */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date of diagnosis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alzheimers_status_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the researcher is affiliated with */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher (e.g., PI, co-PI, analyst) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher accessing the data */,
  "imaging_id" INTEGER /* ID of the imaging data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_reason" TEXT /* Reason for accessing the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_imaging_id FOREIGN KEY ("imaging_id") REFERENCES imaging_data ("imaging_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "authors" TEXT /* Authors of the publication */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal the publication was published in */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the publication was published */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_imaging_data" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "imaging_id" INTEGER /* ID of the imaging data used in the publication */,
  "contribution" TEXT /* Contribution of the imaging data to the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id", "imaging_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sharing_agreements" (
  "agreement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data sharing agreement */,
  "institution1" TEXT /* Name of the first institution */,
  "institution2" TEXT /* Name of the second institution */,
  "agreement_date" TEXT /* Date the agreement was signed */,
  "agreement_terms" TEXT /* Terms of the agreement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agreement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sharing_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data sharing request */,
  "agreement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data sharing agreement the request is associated with */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date the request was made */,
  "request_status" TEXT /* Status of the request (e.g., pending, approved, denied) */,
  "request_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sharing_requests_agreement_id FOREIGN KEY ("agreement_id") REFERENCES data_sharing_agreements ("agreement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the data format (e.g., DICOM, NIfTI) */,
  "format_description" TEXT /* Description of the data format */,
  "format_version" TEXT /* Version of the data format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "imaging_data_formats" (
  "imaging_id" INTEGER /* ID of the imaging data */,
  "format_id" INTEGER /* ID of the format the imaging data is stored in */,
  "conversion_date" TEXT /* Date the imaging data was converted to the format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("imaging_id", "format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_control" (
  "qc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality control entry */,
  "imaging_id" INTEGER /* ID of the imaging data the QC is associated with */,
  "qc_date" TEXT /* Date the QC was performed */,
  "qc_status" TEXT /* Status of the QC (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "qc_comments" TEXT /* Comments on the QC results */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("qc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_control_imaging_id FOREIGN KEY ("imaging_id") REFERENCES imaging_data ("imaging_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "qc_procedures" (
  "procedure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each QC procedure */,
  "procedure_name" TEXT /* Name of the QC procedure */,
  "procedure_description" TEXT /* Description of the QC procedure */,
  "procedure_version" TEXT /* Version of the QC procedure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("procedure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "qc_procedure_imaging_data" (
  "procedure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the QC procedure */,
  "imaging_id" INTEGER /* ID of the imaging data the procedure is used on */,
  "qc_date" TEXT /* Date the QC procedure was applied */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("procedure_id", "imaging_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genomics_data" (
  "genomics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genomics dataset */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the genomics data belongs to */,
  "genomics_data" TEXT /* Genomics data itself (e.g., VCF, BAM) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genomics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genomics_data_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "electronic_health_records" (
  "ehr_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each EHR dataset */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the EHR data belongs to */,
  "ehr_data" TEXT /* EHR data itself (e.g., XML, JSON) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ehr_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_electronic_health_records_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)
